description_long: This nightstand features a simple, rectangular wooden body with a single drawer at the front, topped by a circular mirror mounted vertically. The drawer is accessed via a small, horizontal slot, and the nightstand stands on four straight, slender legs. The wood finish is light beige, giving it a neutral and modern appearance suitable for various urban settings. The circular mirror is framed in a matching material, providing both function and a touch of visual interest. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or ornate hardware. Its compact size and straightforward construction make it ideal for placement in small living spaces or bedrooms.
description: A minimalist wooden nightstand with a single drawer, slender legs, and a circular mirror mounted on top. The design is simple and modern, with a light beige finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a horizontal slot and the circular mirror above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the vertical support for the mirror.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the circular mirror and the plain back panel of the nightstand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and vertical mirror support.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
